title: The Silent Street
content: Every evening, Oliver walked home through the same quiet street. One night, he noticed something unusual. The street was completely silent. There were no birds, no cars, and no voices. The silence felt strange, so he stopped to listen. A few moments later, he realized that the city had experienced a short power outage. Without traffic lights, store signs, or air conditioners, the neighborhood became much quieter than usual. Soon the electricity returned, and the familiar sounds filled the street once again.
